candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Malformed combined label; not current assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, useful cross-check but target asks for balance sheet cash.

variables.notes: Preferred balance sheet cash line over cash flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component only, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported current liabilities total.

candidates.why: Clean IFRS-style current debt line; best match for short-term debt/current portion of debt and excludes trade payables/taxes. More comprehensive and preferable to component debt lines.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Also a good explicit STD label, but appears only in one period and may overlap with current interest-bearing liabilities if both selected.
Likely a component or alternative presentation of short-term borrowings; weaker than a clean current interest-bearing liabilities total.
Debt-related but likely narrower component than current interest-bearing liabilities.
Would fit only if no cleaner total existed; here it is blank and less reliable.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: R:c. Priority list across years: 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' is the preferred clean current debt line. 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' is included as an alternate label for years where naming changes. Excluded lease-specific rows per instruction.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label for payable/current tax liabilities; presented among current liabilities.
Non-current deferred taxes, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Asset, opposite sign/side of payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the only semantically appropriate current tax payable-type line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact reported PPE line; target prefers total/net PPE when available.
Would be gross tangible assets, but blank and less preferable than reported PPE.
Separate ROU assets, not baseline PPE total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported net PPE line, which is preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.

variables.notes: Selected exact net cash flow from operating activities line.
